Class UnownedMonster

java.lang.Object
com.glisterbyte.singingmonsters.main.monster.AbstractMonster
com.glisterbyte.singingmonsters.main.monster.UnownedMonster
All Implemented Interfaces:
HasClient, HasSfsData, Positioned, ReadableMonster
Direct Known Subclasses:
UnownedEggBoxMonster
public class UnownedMonster extends AbstractMonster
